allow: Bash(git -c user.email="abenrached17@gmail.com" -c user.name="Vyuob" commit -m "Update: passive recon \(champ libre + dorks OSINT\), SSLyze \(pre-check TCP + messages d'erreur clairs\), reorganisation UI")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost/login" -UseBasicParsing -SkipCertificateCheck -TimeoutSec 10; "HTTPS OK : Status $\($r.StatusCode\), Length $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "ERREUR : $_" }; Write-Host ""; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost/" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "HTTP 80 : $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode -eq 'MovedPermanently'\) { "HTTP 80 redirect vers HTTPS : OK \(301\)" } else { "ERREUR HTTP : $_" } })

PowerShell($cert = Import-Certificate -FilePath "docker\\caddy\\caddy-root-ca.crt" -CertStoreLocation Cert:\\CurrentUser\\Root; "OK - Certificat installe :"; "  Sujet      : $\($cert.Subject\)"; "  Emis par   : $\($cert.Issuer\)"; "  Valide jusqu'au : $\($cert.NotAfter\)"; "  Thumbprint : $\($cert.Thumbprint\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "HTTPS 443 OK -> Status $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes recus, certificat valide" } catch { "ECHEC : $_" })

PowerShell([Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12 -bor [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls11; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://localhost/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "HTTPS 443 OK -> Status $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes, CERTIFICAT VALIDE \(cadenas vert\)" } catch { "ECHEC : $_" })
Bash(git commit -m 'Add: Caddy HTTPS reverse proxy + GitHub Actions/GitLab CI pipelines *)
